str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - developer-abroad
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Overcoming the Challenges of Being a Developer in a Foreign Country
entry.summary: In today's globalized world, working as a developer in a foreign country has become increasingly common. However, it can also present unique challenges that require adaptation and resilience. In this blog post, we explore ten practical tips for overcoming these challenges, from learning the local language to building a support system, seeking feedback and mentorship, and embracing cultural differences. Whether you're a seasoned expat or a newcomer to the international coding scene, this post is filled with valuable insights and advice that will help you thrive as a developer in a foreign country. So, join us as we dive into the world of global development and explore the exciting opportunities and challenges that come with it!
